text:
oral medication(s) and proper dosage(s) at the correct times.
01 = Able to take medication(s) at the correct times if: (a) individual dosages are prepared in advance by another person; OR (b) another person develops a drug diary or chart.
02 = Able to take medication(s) at the correct times if given reminders by another person at the appropriate times.
03 = Unable to take medication unless administered by another person.
NA = No oral medications prescribed. CHAR 2 x x x x x
